_comment: Template only. Claude Code loads .mcp.json, NOT this file. To enable a server, copy its entry into .mcp.json's mcpServers, then UNCOMMENT the matching mcp__ line in the relevant agent's tools list. Add only what you actually use, and pin versions like the two examples below (both npm-published). Other useful servers ship OUTSIDE npm and need their own runner — e.g. semgrep-mcp / osv-mcp via uvx or pipx; add them with the correct command, NOT 'npx -y <name>' (that would fetch an unrelated npm package of the same name).
